description: Drive a StablecoinX business account — auth, API keys, sessions, paymaster, and webhooks.
name: io.github.e2xlabs/stablecoinx-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Passphrase used to encrypt the local state file (JWT / API key / session key) at rest. Pick any string. The harness endpoint, thirdweb client, origin and login chain are baked into the package — this is the only required input.
environmentVariables.name: SCX_STATE_PASSPHRASE

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Directory for the encrypted local state file. Defaults to %APPDATA%/stablecoinx-mcp (Windows) or $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/stablecoinx-mcp.
environmentVariables.name: SCX_STATE_DIR

packageArguments.description: Run setup to install the bundled skill and register this MCP via `claude mcp add` (optional; for MCP clients that provide an `mcp add` CLI).

title: StablecoinX
